response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience and a strong background in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms, his resume lacks the required 2+ years of formal people management experience. This role is a mid-to-senior management position emphasizing full-time team leadership, 1:1s, and performance management, which does not align with his extensive but heavily Individual Contributor (IC) focused career trajectory.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience with strong system design and architecture skills.
Highly relevant experience building developer tools, test runners, and CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Altom Consulting).
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentorship through organizing workshops, dojos, and founding an open-source platform.
concerns: No explicitly stated experience in formal people management, conducting 1:1s, or managing direct reports.
Lacks the preferred 3 years of experience leading organizational change.
Recent professional roles have been strictly focused on individual contributor responsibilities rather than full-time team leadership.
